justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences and offered relevant alternatives when the initial request was unavailable.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed two close alternatives in the same turn when the initial requested time was not available.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the request in two turns without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, leading to a positive customer experience.
